div1.entryFree: Pare, to shorten by trimming and cutting: let not him p. his nails, Mids. IV, 2, 41. All's V, 2, 31. Tw. IV, 2, 140. H5 IV, 4, 76. to have his princely paws --d all away, Tit. II, 3, 152. thou hast --d thy wit o' both sides, Lr. I, 4, 204. Hence == to diminish in general: but --d my present havings, to bestow my bounties upon you, H8 III, 2, 159.
